findings.finding: M-202 has the lowest OEE in the plant (83.5%)
findings.likely_driver: Availability loss from unplanned stops and below-target performance
findings.business_impact: Reduced effective capacity and higher unit cost on this asset
findings.recommended_action: Prioritise this machine for a focused OEE improvement review (setup reduction, minor-stop elimination)

findings.finding: Unplanned downtime accounts for 66% of all downtime; 'power fluctuation' is the largest reason
findings.likely_driver: Recurring 'power fluctuation' events, concentrated on M-202
findings.business_impact: ~72 operating hours lost to unplanned stops
findings.recommended_action: Launch a Pareto-led downtime reduction effort on the top reason and condition-monitor the worst machine

findings.finding: Line B has the highest defect rate; 'misalignment' is the most common defect
findings.likely_driver: Process variation and shift-related quality differences
findings.business_impact: ~$210,428 estimated scrap and rework margin loss
findings.recommended_action: Stand up a containment and corrective-action plan for the top defect type on the worst line

findings.finding: 7 process(es) below Cpk 1.33; M-102 is the least capable
findings.likely_driver: Excess common-cause variation relative to the spec window
findings.business_impact: 0 inspection point(s) outside specification raise escape and rework risk
findings.recommended_action: Centre and tighten the lowest-capability process; investigate any out-of-control points for special causes

findings.finding: M-302 carries the highest predicted failure risk (87%) over the next 7 days
findings.likely_driver: Elevated vibration/temperature trend, machine age, and recent event history
findings.business_impact: High likelihood of an unplanned stop and reactive repair cost
findings.recommended_action: Schedule a proactive inspection on M-302 and review the Random Forest watchlist weekly (recall 0.86)
